news.t: 3 Inverse ETFs to Short Small Cap Stocks

overview.description: The ProShares Short S&P Mid Cap400 (MYY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Mid Cap 400 index. The fund provides inverse exposure to a market cap-weighted index of 400 US mid-cap companies. MYY was launched on Jun 19, 2006 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: 3 Inverse ETFs to Short Small Cap Stocks
data.text: Three inverse ETFs to short small cap stocks are MYY, SBB, and RWM.
